benefits.description: Lost quite a bit of weight since starting Tirzepatide in June

side_effects.description: Multiple nodules/cysts found in abdomen at injection sites, likely related to prior radiation-induced fat necrosis and oil cysts rather than peptide injections themselves

protocol_notes: Subcutaneous injections to abdomen using sterile insulin needles. Initially mixing 100 units per vial reconstitution (later identified as potentially excessive volume). Started June 2023. BMI approximately 30%. Post-update clarification: nodules determined to be fat necrosis and oil cysts from prior abdominal radiation therapy (ended ~2 years prior), not directly caused by peptide injections. Plan to rotate injection sites to upper arm, upper buttocks, or glute going forward.
